name: isr-skills
description: Agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Information Systems Research (ISR), the INFORMS quarterly and Basket-of-Eight journal at the intersection of technology, organizations, economics, and society. Built for ISR's deliberately sociotechnical and intradisciplinary mission, which houses rigorous behavioral/empirical research and analytical economic, econometric, and design-science modeling as co-equal genres. Covers fit-driven topic selection, theory development and analytical/behavioral mechanism building, literature positioning that bridges IS silos, multimethod research design and analysis, contribution framing (including the mandatory ~500-word contribution statement), INFORMS house-style exhibits and prose, ScholarOne submission with required editor/reviewer nominations, the Senior-Editor-led review process, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs.
